---
title: "Week 16: Work Week"
subtitle: "No New Reading — Final Project Assembly"
date: "2026-05-05"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
---

## Work Week

No class meetings or new readings this week. Use this time to assemble and polish your final portfolio.

### What You Should Be Doing

1. **Writing** — Finalize all sections of your Quarto Book project
2. **Rendering** — Run `quarto render` frequently to catch errors early
3. **Publishing** — Push to GitHub and enable GitHub Pages
4. **Testing** — Open your live URL in a private browser window to verify everything works
5. **Polishing** — Delete instruction comments, check figure captions, verify citations

### Getting Help

- **Office hours:** MW 10:00–11:30 and 1:30–3:00, Dunham Hall 1017
- **Discord:** APLeith
- **Email:** aleith@siue.edu

### Reminder

The Final Web Portfolio is due **Friday, May 8, 2026 at 11:59 pm**. Submit both the PDF file and your live GitHub Pages URL to Blackboard.
